title: ophiuros incurvatus
intro: Ophiuros incurvatus, also known as the 'curved snake root', is a plant species that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Ophiuros incurvatus include relief from pain, reduction in swelling, and potential antimicrobial effects. It can be found in herbal preparations such as tinctures and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
